markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Plain (B2B support platform) and GrowthX (content marketing agency).](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Plain is seeking to improve top-of-funnel growth and brand awareness in the B2B support space](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and production, focusing on organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Potential for customized content approaches tailored to Plain's unique market position](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [GrowthX's services could align well with Plain's post-Series A growth objectives](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Topics

### Plain's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Recently closed Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Provides support platform for B2B companies over Slack, Microsoft Teams, Discord](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Target customers: Developer tool/infrastructure companies, 5-25 person support teams](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Deal sizes: $5-6K ARR (low end) to $24-36K ARR (high end)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Main challenge: Predictably filling top of funnel and increasing brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [End-to-end content strategy and production using AI-assisted workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Services include keyword research, content creation, SEO optimization, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Focus on systematically producing high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Typical results: Significant traffic increases (e.g., 24x for DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Pricing: Work stream-based model, starting at $9,000/month for \~25 articles](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Create a comprehensive "ContentOS" strategy tailored to client's market and audience](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Utilize AI and human expertise to produce relevant, high-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Emphasis on both creating new content and refreshing existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Potential for creating unique content formats (e.g., directories, glossaries, profiles)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Conversion and Revenue Impact

  - [Focus on increasing overall site traffic and brand visibility](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Clients see varying results based on existing conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Long-term benefits include increased domain authority and "warm" outbound opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Some clients report significant revenue growth (e.g., 5x ARR increase)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Potential Collaboration Ideas for Plain

  - [Explore unique content formats beyond typical support articles (e.g., CS leader profiles)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Consider creating authoritative resources on Slack/Discord best practices for support](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Investigate content opportunities around Discord support (noted as an underserved area)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send sample Statement of Work (SLW) and add Plain to Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Plain to review proposal and consider timing (next available start date in late February)](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Explore potential for expedited engagement given Plain's post-Series A growth phase](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Plain to potentially book a demo of GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Further discuss customized content strategies for Plain's unique market position](https://fathom.video/share/1hp7uo-dLZMk53zxLsLMMiazGRTsMefT?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
